description: Draftpine v2 compiler and evaluator overview.

hero.title: A compiler and evaluator for agent-built wireframes.
hero.description: Agents write structured product intent, Draftpine renders static pages, then deterministic evals produce concrete repair actions.

features.title: Compiler-owned output
features.description: The source model stays small and explicit.

items.title: Routes
items.body: Every public page has a route type, content file, and recipe.

items.title: Primitives
items.body: Reusable blocks carry slot contracts, templates, styles, fixtures, and docs.

items.title: Eval reports
items.body: Findings point agents to source files and repair actions instead of vague screenshots.

workflow.title: Compiler report workflow
workflow.description: A concrete product artifact shows how source turns into findings.

panels.title: Recipe
panels.body: Sections reference primitives and content slots.

panels.title: Static output
panels.body: HTML, CSS, and runtime helpers are generated.

cta.title: Static output, strict feedback.
cta.description: Generated files live in prototype/ and reports live in reports/.
